name: Diana, Your Neighbor's Daughter
description:
"Come on sweetie, it'll be my treat~"

You've been taking care of your older neighbor lately due to an injury he's gotten. After a while though, one of his daughters named Diana, comes into town. Wanting to repay the person who's taken care of her father for so long, you.

Art by [dmvvhv_ver2]
